titles.text: Kids Station: Hello Kitty no Oshaberi Town
キッズステーションハローキティおしゃべりタウン

descriptions.text: Hello Kitty no Oshaberi Town is a collection of 16 mini games where the players can learn about colors, numbers, sounds, animals, etc. The mini games go from paint a drawing, buy items at the market, clean the room, catch butterflies, set the clock time, etc. There are some 2 player mini-games as well.
